rewritten_requirements: The system shall start a campaign after a manager and staff are assigned.
The system shall activate the campaign once everything is approved and the contract is signed.
The system shall prepare adverts during the campaign.
The system shall approve and schedule the adverts.
The system shall run the adverts.
The system shall allow extension or adjustment of the campaign while it is running.
The system shall complete the campaign and prepare a final statement after all adverts have finished.
The system shall handle payment after the campaign completion and generate a refund if the amount paid is less than required.
The system shall wait for the correct balance to be settled if the amount paid exceeds the required amount.
The system shall mark the campaign as paid once the full amount is properly paid.
The system shall archive the campaign and release all assigned staff and managers.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: A campaign starts after a manager and staff are assigned.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: A campaign starts after a manager and staff are assigned.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Once everything is approved and the contract is signed, the campaign becomes active.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once everything is approved and the contract is signed, the campaign becomes active.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: During the campaign, adverts are prepared first.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: During the campaign, work goes through a few steps. The adverts are first prepared,

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Adverts are then approved and scheduled.
The campaign can be extended or adjusted while it is running.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If needed, the campaign can be extended or adjusted while it is running.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: After all adverts have finished, the campaign is completed and a final statement is prepared.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After all adverts have finished, the campaign is completed and a final statement is prepared.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Payment handling occurs after the campaign completion. If the amount paid is less than required, a refund is generated.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Then payment is handled. If the amount paid is less than required, a refund is generated.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: If the amount paid exceeds the required amount, the system waits until the correct balance is settled.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: If it is more, the system waits until the correct balance is settled.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: Once the full amount is properly paid, the campaign is marked as paid.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Once the full amount is properly paid, the campaign is marked as paid.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The campaign is archived and all assigned staff and managers are released.
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: Finally, the campaign is archived and all assigned staff and managers are released.
